name: Sharp Pow Daemon
description: Daemon sharpening via polynomial output function. No input, no learning. Each term is coeff * sign(t) * |t|^n, summed together. Use tension view to compare peak shape.

config.description: Polynomial tension shaping: f(t) = sum of coeff·t^n terms. x = linear, x_pow_2 = quadratic, x_pow_3 = cubic. Example: {x: 1, x_pow_2: 0.5} = t + 0.5·t². Experiment with different combinations to sharpen daemon peaks.
